## Summary
What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/Build
- [ ] Security

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run preflight:staging`
- [ ] `npm run preflight:prod`

## Security / risk notes
Any auth/session/CSRF/rate-limit/privacy impact?

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets or non-example env files committed
- [ ] Docs updated where needed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
